query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_project_linked,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%LATAM%' OR title LIKE '%Latin America%' OR title LIKE '%Americas%' OR title LIKE '%EMEA%' OR title LIKE '%Europe%' OR title LIKE '%Asia %' OR title LIKE '%Africa%' OR title LIKE '%Middle East%' OR title LIKE '%North America%' OR title LIKE '%South America%' OR title LIKE '%USA%' OR title LIKE '%UK %' OR title LIKE '%India%' OR title LIKE '%China%' OR title LIKE '%Japan%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_au_in_title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary LIKE '%LATAM%' OR summary LIKE '%Latin America%' OR summary LIKE '%Americas%' OR summary LIKE '%EMEA%' OR summary LIKE '%Europe%' OR summary LIKE '%Africa%' OR summary LIKE '%Middle East%' OR summary LIKE '%North America%' OR summary LIKE '%South America%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_au_in_summary
FROM contacts
WHERE id IN (SELECT contactId FROM contactProjects)

  SUM(CASE WHEN summary LIKE '%LATAM%' OR summary LIKE '%Latin America%' OR summary LIKE '%Americas%' OR summary LIKE '%EMEA%' OR summary LIKE '%Europe%' OR summary LIKE '%Africa%' OR summary LIKE '%Middle East%' OR summary LIKE '%North America%' OR summary LIKE '%South America%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_au_in_summary
FROM contacts
